windows.embed_text_v2: finished molded rose flower candle, two-tone pink and cream petals, single wick, displayed in fluted glass dish on white lace doily with artificial roses, decorative beauty shot
windows.summary_v2: Intro beauty shot slowly panning over a finished rose-shaped pink-and-cream candle displayed in a glass dish on lace with artificial roses behind.

tags_v2.setting: decorative tabletop with lace and faux roses

seconds_v2.desc: Finished rose-shaped candle, deep pink petals with a single wick, sitting in a fluted glass dish on a white lace doily, cream artificial roses behind.
Same molded flower candle in the glass bowl, layered pink petals radiating outward, upright wick at center, sprays of beige roses in the background.
Top-down display of the pink rose candle in the clear glass dish, petal detail crisp, lace cloth beneath and artificial roses above.
Static beauty shot of the rose candle, vivid pink bloom with cream edges, centered wick, glass dish on doily with floral backdrop.
Continued display of the flower-shaped candle, glossy pink petals, single wick upright, surrounded by faux roses and lace.
Camera shifts slightly closer; petals now show pink centers with pale cream tips, fuller rose bloom in the glass dish on lace.
Rose candle with pink-and-cream two-tone petals fanning out around the wick, glass bowl on white doily, beige roses behind.
Close display of the layered flower candle, red-pink inner petals and cream outer tips, centered wick, decorative floral and lace setting.
Final beauty shot of the finished rose candle in the fluted glass dish, two-tone pink and cream petals, single wick, faux roses and lace around it.

windows.embed_text_v2: finished decorative candles, molded rose and peony wax flowers in pink yellow orange, arranged with green fern sprigs on cream wax in glass bowl and dish, beauty display shot
windows.summary_v2: Intro display footage moving from a pink rose-shaped candle to a glass bowl candle decorated with arranged pastel wax flowers and greenery, all shown as finished pieces.

tags_v2.setting: decorative tabletop with lace and faux roses

seconds_v2.desc: Finished rose-shaped candle with pink and cream petals in a fluted glass dish on a lace doily, single wick, beige artificial roses behind.
Same molded flower candle, layered pink-and-cream petals around an upright wick, glass bowl on white lace with floral backdrop.
Cut to a different display: a glass bowl of smooth cream wax topped with arranged molded mini-flowers, pink roses and carnations plus yellow and orange peony shapes with green fern sprigs.
Top-down view of the cream wax bowl decorated with pink molded roses, yellow and orange flower candles and green foliage arranged around a central wick.
Continued display of the floral candle bowl, glossy pink and pastel wax flowers laid on the pale cream surface, artificial roses behind.
Arranged wax flowers on the cream candle surface in the glass bowl, pink roses clustered left, yellow and orange blooms at top, fern accents.
Slightly closer view of the decorated candle bowl, multiple pink molded roses and carnations with green sprigs framing the wick on cream wax.
Lower angle on the glass bowl candle, pink wax roses and carnations ringing the centered wick, yellow and orange flowers at back, green fronds.
Final view of the finished flower-topped candle in the clear bowl, pastel pink, yellow and orange molded blooms with fern leaves on smooth cream wax.

windows.embed_text_v2: Pouring clear amber melted wax from red saucepan into ribbed glass jar with centered cotton wick held by chopstick wick-bar; second crystal bowl prepped beside it with wick already centered, lace tablecloth and faux flowers around.
windows.summary_v2: Amber melted wax is poured from a red saucepan into a small ribbed glass holder, then the setup pans to reveal a larger empty crystal bowl prepped with a centered wick for the next pour.

seconds_v2.desc: A small red-handled saucepan tips and pours clear amber melted wax into a ribbed glass cup; wick is centered by a chopstick laid across the rim, cream lace tablecloth and faux flowers in the background.
Pouring continues from the saucepan into the ribbed glass; the cup is now mostly full of amber wax with the wick suspended by the cross-stick.
Saucepan tipped further; final bit of amber wax streams into the small glass cup, wick still held by chopsticks.
Saucepan lifts away; ribbed glass cup sits full of clear amber wax with the cotton wick centered by two cross-sticks across the rim.
Saucepan moves out of frame; the filled small glass candle stands alone with wick held centered by the wooden chopstick wick-bar.
Cut to a wider shot: a large empty ribbed glass bowl set on the lace cloth, wick centered with a wooden stick across the top, red saucepan visible at top of frame.
Same wide shot; empty clear glass bowl with centered wick awaits a pour, faux roses behind.
Composition holds: the empty glass bowl with wick-bar setup beside the previously poured small candle (now off-frame), saucepan with remaining wax at top edge.
Top-down view: empty crystal-cut glass bowl with wick centered by a wooden stick on the left, completed amber wax candle in ribbed glass on the right, red saucepan top-left.

tags_v2.action: presenting and displaying finished flower candles
tags_v2.setting: decorative tabletop with lace and faux roses

seconds_v2.desc: Hand reaches in at right beside a glass bowl candle topped with arranged pink, yellow and orange wax flowers; two smaller flower candles in glass dishes sit in front on lace.
Display of three finished candles, the large floral bowl behind and two molded flower candles (pink peony and red-cream bloom) in dishes in front, lace cloth beneath.
Top-down of the candle trio, decorated cream bowl with pink roses at back, a pink rose candle and a red-and-cream rose candle in front on the doily.
Continued group display of the flower-topped bowl and two smaller molded rose candles in glass dishes arranged on white lace.
Cut to a single pink rose-shaped candle in a fluted glass dish on lace, centered wick, beige artificial roses behind.
Same pink molded rose candle, layered petals with cream edges around an upright wick, glass bowl on doily with floral backdrop.
Beauty shot of the rose candle, vivid pink bloom, single wick, fluted glass dish on white lace with faux roses above.
Closer view of the pink rose candle's petal detail and centered wick in the glass dish, artificial roses filling the background.
Final outro shot of the finished pink rose candle in the clear dish on lace, full bloom petals and single wick, beige roses behind.

windows.embed_text_v2: Finished decorative rose-shaped candles displayed on lace tablecloth; large pink-and-cream rose candle in fluted glass dish, then bowl arrangement of pink yellow orange molded rose candles on white wax base with green sprigs.
windows.summary_v2: Decorative reveal of finished rose-shaped candles: a large pink-and-cream rose in a fluted dish, then a wider bowl arrangement with multiple rose-shaped candles on a white wax base.

tags_v2.setting: decorated tabletop with faux flowers and lace

seconds_v2.desc: Top-down view of a finished pink-and-cream rose-shaped candle sitting in a fluted clear glass dish, surrounded by faux cream roses on a lace tablecloth.
Same composition; the carved rose candle's petals are detailed pink with cream tips, single wick at the center.
Static shot; finished molded rose candle gleams in the glass dish, faux flower bouquet behind.
Continued display of the rose candle in its dish; petals layered, color gradient pink-to-cream.
Same shot held; decorative finished rose candle remains the focus.
Final view of single rose candle in dish before scene change.
Cut to a wider arrangement: a glass bowl filled with a white wax base topped with multiple small rose-shaped candles in pink, plus a larger yellow and orange rose, garnished with green sprigs.
Same decorative bowl with assorted rose candles; small pink roses surround the larger yellow and orange rose candles arranged like a floral display.
Hold on the finished floral-candle bowl arrangement; multicolor rose candles sit on white wax, pine sprigs as accents, faux roses behind.
